creator: mhjacks@swbell.net
text:
- Update to 1.5.0

- This release adds some additional RRTYPES (DHCID, SPF, IPSECKEY) and improves support for Python 2.5

- Under 2.5, it writes a file I'm not sure how to exclude conditionally on python-2.5 (lib/python2.5/site-packages/dnspython-1.5.0-py2.5.egg-info).

Port maintainer (lioux@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
